reasoning: Produce a concise summary of the article, highlighting Woods' missed cut and comeback, Rose's eight-under lead, and other key players, while including the notable quotes in a paraphrased form.
output: Tiger Woods’ comeback at Torrey Pines ended with a missed cut after a first-round 76 and a second-round 72, four shots outside the cut. World No. 1 Jason Day and US Open champion Dustin Johnson also missed the weekend. Overnight leader Justin Rose moved to eight under after a 71, with Adam Hadwin and Brandt Snedeker tied for second at seven under. Jimmy Walker finished over par, and Ireland’s Shane Lowry was level par with Scotland’s Martin Laird and England’s Paul Casey at two under. Woods, playing his second event in 15 months, said it was frustrating not to have a chance to win but that today was an improvement and he hit the ball and putted better.
